subcodes.first_line: Dear and deeply spiritual sister! At morn and eventide, with the utmost ardour and humility, I supplicate at the Divine Threshold, and offer this, my prayer
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الشقیقه الروحانیه در شب و روز بدرگاه احدیت عجز و نیاز کنم و ناله و فغان
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
